facts.text: html { background: black; scrollbar-color: rgb(100, 100, 100) rgb(37, 37, 37); } textarea { scrollbar-color: initial; } body { font-family: monospace; background: black; background: url("/assets/stars.png"); background-blend-mode: multiply; background-attachment: fixed; image-rendering: pixelated; background-size: 600px; color: white; margin: 0; } li { font-size: 1.1em; } hr { color: rgb(179, 179, 0); border-style: none none solid none; } b { color: rgb(131, 255, 207); } code { background-color: rgb(7, 7, 7); color: rgb(177, 177, 177); padding: 2px 4px; font-size: 0.9em; } /* Email */ .e-m-a, .i-l { display: none; /* Spam prevention */ } .email { color: rgb(251, 255, 0); } /* Buttons */ .buttons { display: flex; gap: 10px; width: fit-content; margin: auto; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .buttons img, #progress { border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); width: 88px; height: 31px; } #progress { display: none; } /* Header */ #header { display: flex; gap: 20px; margin-top: 20px; max-width: 100%; } #flag { width: 125px; object-fit: cover; image-rendering: auto; border-radius: 20px; padding: 2px; background: black; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); } #title { background: white; background: linear-gradient( 90deg, rgb(255, 50, 118), rgb(255, 165, 31), rgb(219, 205, 0), rgb(133, 231, 14), rgb(59, 216, 255), rgb(216, 87, 255) ); background-clip: text; color: transparent; background-size: cover; margin: 0px auto; width: 415px; font-size: 3em; text-shadow: none; filter: drop-shadow(5px 5px 3px rgba(255, 238, 0, 0.3)); padding: 10px; text-align: center; } #title a { text-decoration: none; color: transparent; } #desc { margin: 0; margin-top: 10px; margin-bottom: 20px; font-size: 1.5em; text-shadow: 2px 2px 0px black; text-align: center; padding: 0px 10px; } /* Containers */ .wrapper { margin: 0px auto; padding: 10px 0px; width: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; align-items: center; min-height: 100dvh; } .wrapper > :last-child { margin-bottom: 20px; } .wrapper > :first-child { margin-top: 20px; } .container { width: 100%; max-width: 1100px; background: url("/assets/background.png"); background-size: 900px; padding: 20px; border: 3px outset rgb(116, 31, 31); border-image: linear-gradient( 180deg, rgb(223, 0, 74), rgb(224, 135, 0), rgb(236, 193, 0), rgb(111, 202, 0), rgb(0, 169, 211), rgb(118, 0, 197) ); border-image-slice: 1; color: white; box-sizing: border-box; box-shadow: 0px 0px 10px rgba(5, 1, 49, 1) inset; } .container p { font-size: 1.2em; line-height: 1.3em; } .container p:last-child { margin-bottom: 10px; } h1 { font-family: "Lemon", system-ui; font-size: 1.6em; font-weight: normal; margin-top: 5px; background: white; background: linear-gradient( 90deg, rgb(255, 50, 118), rgb(255, 165, 31), rgb(219, 205, 0), rgb(133, 231, 14), rgb(59, 216, 255), rgb(216, 87, 255) ); background-size: cover; background-clip: text; color: transparent; width: fit-content; filter: drop-shadow(2px 2px 0px black); } h2 { background: white; background: linear-gradient( 90deg, rgb(255, 191, 54), rgba(239, 229, 36, 1), rgb(168, 255, 61) ); background-size: cover; background-clip: text; color: transparent; width: fit-content; } li { line-height: 1.4em; font-size: 1rem; } li::marker { color: cyan; font-weight: bold; } /* Quicklink */ #quicklinks { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; font-size: 1.9em; margin-bottom: 20px; } #quicklinks a { text-decoration: none; padding: 5px 10px; color: white; background: black; background: linear-gradient( 90deg, rgb(255, 50, 118), rgb(255, 165, 31), rgb(219, 205, 0), rgb(133, 231, 14), rgb(59, 216, 255), rgb(216, 87, 255) ); background-size: cover; background-clip: text; color: transparent; border-radius: 5px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); backdrop-filter: brightness(0); } #quicklinks a:hover { background: rgb(247, 255, 139); color: black; } /* Members */ table { border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 1.1em; } td { border-top: 1px dashed rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); padding: 10px 5px; vertical-align: top; display: flex; gap: 10px; } tr:nth-child(1) td { border-top: none; } #members-wrapper { /* max-height: 400px; */ overflow-y: scroll; scrollbar-width: thin; border: 1px solid rgb(172, 99, 4); scrollbar-color: #f7b910 #b67b0d; padding: 0px 10px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); image-rendering: pixelated; } a { color: rgb(255, 230, 0); } a:hover { color: white; } .member-links { display: flex; flex: 2.3; gap: 10px; align-items: center; } .member-links :last-child { margin: auto; text-align: center; } .member-desc { flex: 6; height: fit-content; margin: auto 0; text-align: left; line-height: 1.3em; } .member-desc.empty { color: gray; } /* Widgets */ #widgets { display: flex; gap: 10px; justify-content: center; margin: 30px 0px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .widget { width: fit-content; } .widget-wrapper { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; align-items: center; } .widget-wrapper textarea { flex-grow: 1; } .widget-wrapper h3 { text-decoration: underline; margin: 0; margin-bottom: 10px; } #widgets textarea { background: rgb(0, 10, 0); border: 1px solid rgb(24, 74, 87); color: rgb(0, 204, 136); } /* Form */ form { padding: 0px 10px; margin: 30px auto 0px auto; } form label { color: rgb(209, 255, 101); line-height: 1.5em; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } form .required-note, form label .req { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-size: 0.8em; } .required-note { font-size: 0.8rem !important; } input::placeholder, textarea::placeholder { color: rgba(0, 223, 167, 0.5); } form input, form textarea { width: calc(100% - 10px); padding: 5px; background: rgb(0, 10, 0); border: 1px solid rgb(24, 74, 87); color: rgb(236, 255, 184); font-size: 1rem; font-family: monospace; } input:focus { outline: 1px solid rgb(182, 170, 0); } form input[name="description"] { text-align: top; } .alternative { color: rgb(0, 199, 192); font-style: italic; } .alternative .email { color: rgb(246, 255, 126); } form button { background-color: rgb(0, 82, 50); color: yellow; font-family: monospace; padding: 5px; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 1rem; border: 1px solid rgb(0, 138, 108); } form button:hover { cursor: pointer; border-color: rgb(0, 255, 242); color: white; background-color: rgb(5, 117, 74); } /* Small screen styling */ @media screen and (max-width: 620px) { body { margin: 10px 0; } .container { padding: 10px 15px; } .container > p, li { font-size: 0.95rem; } #members-container { padding: 10px 0px; } #members-container > *:not(#members-wrapper) { padding: 0px 15px; } #members-wrapper { border-left: none; border-right: none; } #flag { display: none; } .buttons { position: absolute; opacity: 0.25; z-index: 0; top: 60px; } #progress { display: block; } #header { margin-top: 0px; } #title { font-size: 2.4em; filter: drop-shadow(2px 2px 2px rgba(255, 238, 0, 0.4)); } #quicklinks, #desc, #progress { z-index: 1; } td { flex-direction: column; } .member-links .empty { display: none; } .member-links :last-child { margin: 0; } textarea[name="description"] { height: 60px; } .wrapper > :last-child { margin-bottom: 5px; } .wrapper > :first-child { margin-top: 5px; } .member-desc.empty { display: none; } form input, form textarea { font-size: 0.9em; } }

} input::placeholder, textarea::placeholder { color: rgba(0, 223, 167, 0.5); } form input, form textarea { width: calc(100% - 10px); padding: 5px; background: rgb(0, 10, 0); border: 1px solid rgb(24, 74, 87); color: rgb(236, 255, 184); font-size: 1rem; font-family: monospace; } input:focus { outline: 1px solid rgb(182, 170, 0); } form input[name="description"] { text-align: top; } .alternative { color: rgb(0, 199, 192); font-style: italic; } .alternative .email { color: rgb(246, 255, 126); } form button { background-color: rgb(0, 82, 50); color: yellow; font-family: monospace; padding: 5px; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 1rem; border: 1px solid rgb(0, 138, 108); } form button:hover { cursor: pointer; border-color: rgb(0, 255, 242); color: white; background-color: rgb(5, 117, 74); } /* Small screen styling */ @media screen and (max-width: 620px) { body { margin: 10px 0; } .container { padding: 10px 15px; } .container > p, li { font-size: 0.95rem; } #members-container { padding: 10px 0px; } #members-container > *:not(#members-wrapper) { padding: 0px 15px; } #members-wrapper { border-left: none; border-right: none; } #flag { display: none; } .buttons { position: absolute; opacity: 0.25; z-index: 0; top: 60px; } #progress { display: block; } #header { margin-top: 0px; } #title { font-size: 2.4em; filter: drop-shadow(2px 2px 2px rgba(255, 238, 0, 0.4)); } #quicklinks, #desc, #progress { z-index: 1; } td { flex-direction: column; } .member-links .empty { display: none; } .member-links :last-child { margin: 0; } textarea[name="description"] { height: 60px; } .wrapper > :last-child { margin-bottom: 5px; } .wrapper > :first-child { margin-top: 5px; } .member-desc.empty { display: none; } form input, form textarea { font-size: 0.9em; } }
